documentation.description:
SHAKE has 4 suffix bits appended to each message: 2#1111#.

See Section 6.2 of NIST FIPS-202.

generic_instantiations.name: SHAKE128
generic_instantiations.code:
package SHAKE128 is new Keccak.Generic_XOF
  (XOF_Sponge  => Keccak.Keccak_1600.Rounds_24.Sponge,
   Capacity    => 256,
   Suffix      => 2#11_11#,
   Suffix_Size => 4);

generic_instantiations.name: SHAKE256
generic_instantiations.code:
package SHAKE256 is new Keccak.Generic_XOF
  (XOF_Sponge  => Keccak.Keccak_1600.Rounds_24.Sponge,
   Capacity    => 512,
   Suffix      => 2#11_11#,
   Suffix_Size => 4);
